response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's resume demonstrates extensive experience in full-stack development, web technologies, and software engineering, but lacks the critical embedded systems, C programming for UNIX, and Linux kernel modification experience required for the Security Features Engineer role in embedded networking. While he has strong JavaScript/TypeScript and D language skills, his background does not align with the core technical demands of the position, such as embedded firmware development, security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X), or network switch operations.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with multiple languages and frameworks (JavaScript/TypeScript, D, Node.js, React)
Proven track record in open-source contributions and self-driven projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Experience with Linux and system-level programming (Jack audio server, C++)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX or embedded systems development
Lacks exposure to Linux kernel modification, embedded device firmware, or chip-vendor SDKs
No evidence of proficiency in networking technologies (Layer 2/3, switch operations) or security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption)

key_factors.factor: Embedded C programming for UNIX/Linux kernel
